series_metadata.series_title: Submerged Land Lease and Submerged Lands Permits
series_metadata.series_description: Submerged Land Lease and Submerged Lands Permit instruments, including new, modified, assigned, consents to sublet or mortgage, and terminations - Legal documents recorded in the County Auditors Office. The lease period is for 50 years with a renewable clause of 50 years at the end of each term.
